title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Moscow bans publication of Ukrainian drone strike damage without official permission. The new restrictions prohibit authorities, state-affiliated institutions, media outlets, emergency services, organizations, and residents from publishing text, photo, or video materials showing the aftermath of what officials described as "terrorist acts," including drone attacks.
description_en: Moscow bans publication of Ukrainian drone strike damage without official permission. The new restrictions prohibit authorities, state-affiliated institutions, media outlets, emergency services, organizations, and residents from publishing text, photo, or video materials showing the aftermath of what officials described as "terrorist acts," including drone attacks.
description_uk: Moscow bans publication of Ukrainian drone strike damage without official permission. The new restrictions prohibit authorities, state-affiliated institutions, media outlets, emergency services, organizations, and residents from publishing text, photo, or video materials showing the aftermath of what officials described as "terrorist acts," including drone attacks.

Російські дрони атакували об’єкти...

title: Missile attack
description: And here they got shitty? The Sarmat missile is nothing more than a horror story for Western partners, says military observer Denis Popovych. According to him, the RS-28 "Sarmat" is not intended for strikes on Ukraine and is used by the Kremlin primarily as an instrument of nuclear blackmail: "This is a nightmare for our partners. Look at what we have: an absolute weapon that is supposedly capable of blowing everyone to pieces."...
description_en: And here they got shitty? The Sarmat missile is nothing more than a horror story for Western partners, says military observer Denis Popovych. According to him, the RS-28 "Sarmat" is not intended for strikes on Ukraine and is used by the Kremlin primarily as an instrument of nuclear blackmail: "This is a nightmare for our partners. Look at what we have: an absolute weapon that is supposedly capable of blowing everyone to pieces."...
description_uk: И тут обосрались? Ракета «Сармат» — не более чем страшилка для западных партнеров Так считает военный обозреватель Денис Попович. По его словам, РС-28 «Сармат» не предназначена для ударов по Украине и используется кремлем прежде всего как инструмент ядерного шантажа: «Это страшилка для наших партнеров. Посмотрите, что у нас есть: абсолютное оружие, которое якобы способно разнести всех в щепки»....

title: Missile launch detected
description: 5️⃣6️⃣ "Today's attack by the Russian Federation will last until tomorrow afternoon: there will be a launch of missiles at night, and then another wave of drones," suggests the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. According to him, the hordes had enough time to stock up during the armistice.
description_en: 5️⃣6️⃣ "Today's attack by the Russian Federation will last until tomorrow afternoon: there will be a launch of missiles at night, and then another wave of drones," suggests the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. According to him, the hordes had enough time to stock up during the armistice.
description_uk: 5️⃣6️⃣ "Сегодняшняя атака РФ продлится до завтрашнего полудня: ночью состоится запуск ракет, а затем - еще одна волна дронов", - предполагает советник министра обороны Сергей "Флэш" Бескрестнов. По его словам у орды было достаточно времени для того, чтобы накопить запасы во время перемирия.

title: Kyiv: 200 drones launched
description: Breaking: Russia launches daytime mass attack with over 200 drones on Ukraine. Air raid alerts rang out across Ukraine as a massive swarm of attack drones crossed the Russian border shortly after 11:00 a.m. local time.

title: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash...
title_en: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash...
description: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestny, this time the drones are moving along the border with Belarus at a distance of 5-10 km, literally one by one and in large groups. In this way, Russia is trying to overload the air defense system so that as many drones as possible can break into the depths of the country.
description_en: 5️⃣6️⃣Russia has changed the tactics of using "Shakhedov", - Flash According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestny, this time the drones are moving along the border with Belarus at a distance of 5-10 km, literally one by one and in large groups. In this way, Russia is trying to overload the air defense system so that as many drones as possible can break into the depths of the country.
description_uk: 5️⃣6️⃣русня изменила тактику применения «Шахедов», — Флэш По словам советника министра обороны Сергея Бескрестного, на этот раз дроны движутся вдоль границы с Беларусью на расстоянии 5-10 км, буквально один за другим и сразу большими группами. Таким образом русня пытается перегрузить систему ПВО, чтобы как можно больше беспилотников смогли прорваться вглубь страны.

title: Casualties reported
description: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr named after of the basket chieftain Ivan Sirk, are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, fighters practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, everyone...
description_en: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr named after of the basket chieftain Ivan Sirk, are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, fighters practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, everyone...
description_uk: Тактична медицина — це знання, які на війні рятують життя. Розвідники 92 ОШБр ім. кошового отамана Івана Сірка, постійно вдосконалюють навички надання допомоги собі і пораненим побратимам у бойових умовах. Під час занять бійці відпрацьовують накладання турнікетів, евакуацію поранених, зупинку критичних кровотеч, роботу в умовах стресу та під вогневим впливом противника. У сучасній війні кожен...
